nasb.text: He had thirty sons, and thirty daughters whom he gave in marriage outside the family, and he brought in thirty daughters from outside for his sons. And he judged Israel seven years.

esv.text: He had thirty sons, and thirty daughters he gave in marriage outside his clan, and thirty daughters he brought in from outside for his sons. And he judged Israel seven years.

cnv.text: 他有三十個兒子，三十個女兒；女兒都嫁到外面去，又給他的兒子從外面娶了三十個女子作妻子。他治理以色列人共七年。

ccb.text: 他有三十个儿子、三十个女儿，他从别的宗族给儿子们娶来三十个媳妇，又把女儿都嫁到别的宗族。他做以色列的士师七年，
